errors.apiKeyMaxExpiration: API key expiration cannot exceed 365 days
errors.contactNotFound: Contact ID not found or not accessible.
errors.customColumnNotFound: Custom column ID not found or not accessible. Available columns: {validValues}.
errors.customFieldInvalidCurrency: The currency value is invalid. Must be a valid number.
errors.customFieldInvalidDate: The date value is invalid. Must be in ISO 8601 datetime format (e.g., 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z).
errors.customFieldInvalidEmail: The email value is invalid. Must be a valid email address format (e.g., user@example.com). For multiple emails, separate by comma (e.g., user1@example.com, user2@example.com).
errors.customFieldInvalidPhone: The phone value is invalid. Must be in E.164 format (e.g., +491234567890). For multiple phone numbers, separate by comma (e.g., +491234567890, +499876543210).
errors.customFieldInvalidSingleSelect: The single select value is invalid. Must be one of the allowed options: {validValues}.
errors.customFieldInvalidUrl: The URL value is invalid. Must be a valid URL format (e.g., https://example.com). For multiple URLs, separate by comma (e.g., https://example.com, https://example.org).
errors.dealNotFound: Deal ID not found or not accessible.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.filterBetweenInvalidArrayLength: The 'between' operator requires an array with exactly 2 elements.
errors.invalidFilterField: Filter field not found or not accessible. Available fields: {validValues}.
errors.invalidSortField: Sort field not found or not accessible.
errors.llmApiKeyInvalid: Invalid API key. Please check your key and try again.
errors.notesInvalidFormat: Invalid notes format. Must be valid Tiptap JSON or markdown text
errors.organizationNotFound: Organization ID not found or not accessible.
errors.passwordInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character
errors.roleSystemRequired: At least one user must be a system administrator
errors.serviceNotFound: Service ID not found or not accessible.
errors.taskNameCannotBeChangedForSystemTasks: Name cannot be changed for system tasks
errors.taskNotFound: Task ID not found or not accessible.
errors.taskOnlyCustomTasksCanBeDeleted: Only custom tasks can be deleted
errors.termsNotAgreed: You must agree to the terms and conditions
errors.urlInvalidProtocol: The URL value is invalid. Please check the format.
errors.userNotFound: User ID not found or not accessible.
errors.widgetDealAggregationNotAllowedForTask: Deal aggregation types are not allowed for Task element type
errors.widgetDealFiltersNotAllowedForDealEntity: Deal filters are not allowed when element type is Deal
errors.widgetDealQuantityOnlyForService: Deal quantity aggregation is only allowed for Service element type
errors.widgetGroupByCustomColumnIdRequired: Custom column ID is required when grouping by custom column
errors.widgetGroupByEntityTypeNotAllowedForCoun: Grouping by element type itself is not allowed when aggregation type is count
errors.widgetGroupByTypeMustMatchEntityType: Group by type must match the chart's element type
errors.widgetTaskCanOnlyGroupByCustomColumn: Tasks can only be grouped by custom columns, not by element types

ContactPage.description: Have a question, want a walkthrough, or exploring a partnership? Drop me a note and I'll get back within a day.

form.messagePlaceholder: What are you working on, and how can I help?
form.successBody: I'll get back to you at the email you provided, usually within 24 hours.
form.successToast: Thanks — message received. I'll get back to you shortly.

direct.body: Prefer email? Write directly. Your inquiry lands the same place.
direct.title: Mail: mail@customermates.com

fast.body: Usually within 24 hours, often the same day.
fast.title: Fast reply

personal.body: No ticket queue. I'm the founder and I reply personally.
personal.title: Directly with me

meta.description: Get in touch with Customermates. Questions, partnerships, or just want to say hi — I read every message.
meta.title: Contact Customermates

ContactPage.title: Let's talk.

Dashboard.isTemplate: Share as template for other users of your organization
Dashboard.selectWidgetTemplateDescription: You can select existing charts from members of your organizations and use them as a template for your new chart.

quantity.description: Shows the total quantity of services assigned to deals per period. Quantities are aggregated by your Group by selection to compare segments.

value.description: Shows the total monetary value of deal-related services per period. Values are aggregated by your Group by selection (e.g., organization, contact, service, or custom column).

export.description: Export of CRM data for backups or external use.
export.title: Export

import.description: CSV import for contacts, organizations, and deals.
import.title: Import

DocsPage.englishOnlyAlert: The technical API endpoint documentation is only available in English. This is because API documentation requires precise technical terminology and consistency with industry standards.

ErrorCard.contactSupport: Don't worry, we've been automatically notified about this issue and are already looking into it. If you need immediate assistance, feel free to reach out to our support team.
ErrorCard.demoModeError: Saving, deleting and changing data is not available in demo mode. <link>Start for free now</link> to access all features.
ErrorCard.inactiveUser: Your account is currently inactive. Please contact your administrator to reactivate your account.
ErrorCard.invalidInviteLink: The invitation link you used is not valid or may have been altered. Please reach out to your administrator to request a new, valid invitation link so you can proceed with your registration.
ErrorCard.inviteLinkExpired: The invitation link you tried to use has expired and can no longer be used. Please contact your administrator and ask them to generate a fresh invitation link for you to complete your account setup.
ErrorCard.subtitle: Oops! Something went wrong
ErrorCard.title: Well, that's awkward
ErrorCard.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Don't worry though, we've been notified and are on it!

ErrorTestPage.subtitle: Breaking things on purpose, for science!
ErrorTestPage.title: Error Testing

entities.intro: We've already added one of each to your workspace so you can poke around. Nothing scary — replace or delete them whenever you're ready.

organization.example: Example Inc. — where John Doe works.
organization.purpose: A company, agency, or any group of contacts.
organization.title: Organization

service.example: Consulting Service (€1,000) — bundled into First Project.
service.purpose: Whatever you sell — a physical product, a one-off package, or a recurring service. Tracks what's active and when it renews.
service.title: Service

task.example: Anything actionable — follow-up calls, reminders, next steps.
task.purpose: Something to do, optionally linked to a contact, deal, or organization.

SubscriptionInactivationNotice.body: Your account is now inactive because your subscription has been unpaid or expired for more than 3 days. If you want to continue, I can help you restore access quickly.
